# Output.FlashCompat.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `Output.FlashCompat.txt` | 字数: 269

## 内容全文

Output.FlashCompat

TYPE: bool

VERSION: 4.1.0

DEFAULT: false

--DESCRIPTION--

<p>

If true, HTML Purifier will generate Internet Explorer compatibility

code for all object code.  This is highly recommended if you enable

%HTML.SafeObject.

</p>

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
